response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship credentials, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, far from the required 8 years. His large-scale, low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic is relevant but was done in DLang over roughly two years, and his formal technical-leadership experience on cloud/compute platforms is thin. He would be a strong fit for a senior full-stack or platform-adjacent role, but not this C++-centric compute-platform technical lead position.
strengths: Experience with high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second
Broad engineering range (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) with strong testing/TDD and craftsmanship culture
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8 years of C++ experience (under 1 year professionally)
No formal technical-leadership role leading strategy for a cloud or compute platform
Core infrastructure experience is in DLang/Node.js ecosystems rather than the C++/cloud-compute stack required
